journals.content: Rainy Friday. Spent all day at the coffee shop, feet killing me from the rush. That novel cover sketch is coming along—client wants more 'ethereal' vibes, whatever that means. Luna's been my only company tonight, purring like she approves.

journals.title: Hike with Jordan
journals.content: Woke up to clear skies—miracle! Jordan and I hit Forest Park, mud everywhere but his laugh made it worth it. Talked about everything from work stress to dreams of traveling. Feeling a spark, but still guarded. Why can't I just let go?
Sunday morning yoga flop. Couldn't even hold downward dog without wobbling. App says 'progress takes time'—yeah, right. Need coffee.

journals.title: Spanish practice
journals.content: Monday blues hit hard. Barista shift dragged, spilled lattes on myself twice. But did 20 mins on Duolingo—conjugated verbs like a pro? Nah, but felt good connecting to Abuela's stories. Portfolio overhaul: sketched three new pieces today. Progress!

journals.title: Deadline panic
journals.content: Ugh, client emailed revisions for the cover series—'too dark?' It's fantasy, people! Stayed up late tweaking, anxiety buzzing like crazy. Jordan checked in, offered to bring tacos tomorrow. Small things keep me going. The fog in my head is thick tonight.
Baked matcha churros—total disaster, kitchen looks like a snow globe. Shared the edible ones with book club anyway. Laughed so much my sides hurt. Gratitude for these weirdos.

journals.title: Yoga win
journals.content: Thursday: Nailed a full sun salutation during yoga! Body feels less achy, mind quieter. Update on Jordan—dinner was nice, but he wants to meet my friends soon. Scary, but maybe? Still thinking about that revision email; resubmitted today, fingers crossed.
Friday. Podcast on Spanish lit inspired me—practiced phrases all morning. Work gig starts soon, bracing for hipster orders.

journals.title: Midnight thoughts
journals.content: Client loved the revisions! Popped champagne alone with Luna—felt like a win after weeks of doubt. Jordan's text: 'Proud of you.' Heart flutter. But insomnia hits; why does success feel so fragile? Dreaming of that children's book series more vividly now, deserts calling me home.

journals.title: Weekend plans
journals.content: Super Bowl Sunday? Nah, I'm out. Planning a solo hike instead, maybe sketch some ideas for portfolio. Yoga tomorrow, no skips. Relationship with Jordan: talking about a getaway—nervous excitement. Life's not slipping; it's just rainy.
Monday again. Woke up to rain pattering on the window, Luna staring at me like I owe her breakfast. Feet already ache thinking about the shift, but gotta push through—coffee first.

journals.title: Yoga Win
journals.content: Finally nailed that sun salutation sequence without wobbling! Body feels looser, mind a bit quieter. Still rainy out, but inside I'm glowing a little. Jordan texted about hiking this weekend—nervous but excited.
Spilled a latte on my sketchbook at work. Ruined a half-done doodle of Luna as a desert fox. Frustrated, but hey, accidents happen. Need new inspo for the portfolio overhaul.

journals.title: Date Night Reflections
journals.content: Dinner with Jordan was nice—shared tacos and talked about his latest eco-project. His hand on mine felt... safe? Still guarded, but the flutters are real. Wonder if I should mention book club soon. Home now, baking failed again—churros too soggy. Luna doesn't care.
Duolingo streak broken. Forgot to practice Spanish yesterday amid deadline panic. That fantasy cover approval still buzzing, but now client's asking for tweaks on the series. Breathe, Elena.

journals.title: Weekend Vibes
journals.content: Off today! Curled up with Octavia Butler's new reread, sketching magical desert scenes from memory. New Mexico nostalgia hitting hard—maybe call Mom soon? Yoga tomorrow, rain or not.

journals.title: Hike Hangover
journals.content: Jordan and I did Forest Park—mud everywhere, but the views! Laughed about slipping on roots, shared stories from childhood. Feeling closer, less wary. Legs sore, heart full. Still thinking about introducing him to the group.
Barista blues: endless pour-overs for pretentious types. Sketched a quick portrait of a customer during lull—might use for portfolio. Anxiety creeping in about laptop savings; only $300 so far.

journals.title: Book Club Magic
journals.content: Loved tonight's discussion on Jemisin—resilience themes hit home. Shared my latest sketches; friends hyped about the children's book idea. Baked matcha treats that actually worked! Grateful for this crew.

journals.title: Fresh Start
journals.content: Slept okay, no insomnia last night. Revised those cover tweaks—client loved them! Spanish app back on track; practiced greetings. Planning a solo walk later. Things feel... steady.

Rainy Thursday slog. Spilled foam on a customer's sweater today—apologized profusely, they laughed it off. Jordan texted about a hike this weekend, butterflies. Yoga felt good tonight, held downward dog longer. Grateful for small wins.

journals.title: Friday fog
journals.content: Woke up to Luna staring at me like I owe her breakfast. Coffee shop's buzzing with weekend vibes, but my feet already hurt thinking about the shift. Still thinking about that spilled latte yesterday—why am I such a klutz?

Long day, but Jordan came by the shop after closing. Shared churros I baked last night—crispy outside, gooey inside. Talked about his work trip next month. Feeling closer, but wary. Spanish app: practiced greetings, rusty but fun.

journals.title: Valentine's
journals.content: Jordan surprised me with a picnic in the park—rain held off, miracle. We hiked a bit, held hands. First real kiss that felt... right. Heart racing, but good scared. Baked heart-shaped cookies earlier, Luna stole one. Magic tonight.

Sunday lazy. Sketched some desert scenes from home memories while listening to Spanish podcast. Yoga skipped—rain again. Portfolio pieces coming together, but deadline looming for the novel covers. Need to focus.

journals.title: Monday blues
journals.content: Ugh, back to the grind. Overslept, rushed to work. Customer complained about wait time—took it personally. Anxiety creeping in, why can't I just be enough? Texted Jordan, he cheered me up.

Evening better. Did yoga, breathed through the frustration. Updated Spanish vocab—can say 'I miss New Mexico' now. Thinking about calling Mom soon. Work sketches: finally nailed the dragon's wings for the book cover. Progress!

journals.title: Midweek ramble
journals.content: Barista shift dragged, but book club tonight was a highlight. Laughed so hard over Jemisin's latest twists. Jordan mentioned a getaway idea—coastal cabin? Excited but nervous about committing. Baked vegan tres leches, shared leftovers.

Late night. Freelance revisions came back—client wants more 'whimsy' in the covers. Frustrating, but I'll tweak tomorrow. Yoga streak broken by exhaustion. Luna curled up with me, purring. Simple joys.

journals.title: Thursday thoughts
journals.content: Morning sketch session: urban fox in the rain. Inspired by Portland streets. Spanish call with auntie—stumbled but understood her stories. Nostalgia hit hard, tears. Jordan's supportive, planning that hike update.

journals.title: Friday unwind
journals.content: Work wrap-up: approved sketches sent! Fist pump. Jordan and I grabbed tacos, talked dreams—his enviro stuff, my book ideas. Feeling safe with him. Yoga tomorrow, promise. Weekend excitement building.
Hiked Forest Park with Jordan—mud everywhere, laughed til sore. Spotted wildflowers for sketches. Spanish app streak back on track. Life's messy but beautiful. Grateful.

Sunday evening slump. Rain pounding the window like it's mad at me. Sketched a quick desert scene to remember home—felt good, but now Luna's staring at my half-eaten churro. Jordan texted about a hike next weekend; heart did a little flip. Still buzzing from that kiss last week.

journals.title: Morning fog
journals.content: Woke up to more drizzle. Coffee's brewing, yoga mat out but ugh, motivation low. Gotta push through that routine today—three times a week, remember?

Did yoga after shift, held downward dog longer than last time. Feet killing from barista rush—spilled latte on a customer's scarf, awkward af. But portfolio piece #12 done: revised the dragon for the book cover. Feels solid. Spanish app: learned 'recuerdos'—memories. Fitting.
Monday blues hit hard. Work dragged, customers extra picky. Doodled a grumpy hipster in my notebook during break. Jordan called—talked dreams, his job sounds intense but he's sweet. Miss NM tonight.

journals.title: Baking fail
journals.content: Tried matcha churros—total disaster, kitchen looks like a flour bomb went off. Luna's judging hard. Ate the salvageable ones while reading Jemisin; her worlds make mine feel small but inspired. Deadline looming for covers, need to focus tomorrow.
Book club was lit—laughed so much over Butler's twists. Shared my sketch of a resilient kid in the desert; friends hyped it for my book idea. Yoga skipped again, rain excuse. Starting to feel guilty.

journals.title: Quick note
journals.content: Early shift. Coffee strong. Thinking about Jordan's getaway idea—maybe coast? Nervous but excited.

journals.title: Late night ramble
journals.content: Long day, but breakthrough on the fairy illustration—colors popped just right, client might love it. Practiced Spanish podcast: conjugated verbs, felt rusty but progress. Anxiety creeping in about money—laptop dying soon. Breathe, Elena. The fog lifts, remember? Jordan's text: 'Can't wait for Saturday.' Warmth in this gloom.

Hiked Forest Park solo—mud everywhere, but wildflowers peeking through. Sketched one for reference. Yoga tomorrow for sure. Still thinking about that book club feedback; maybe pitch my series idea sooner.

journals.title: Date night vibes
journals.content: Jordan and I grabbed tacos—fought over the last one, laughed till my sides hurt. Talked trust, past breakups; scary but he gets it. First real deep dive. Home now, Luna curled up. Heart full, but wary—don't mess this up.

journals.title: Frustration peak
journals.content: Client revisions on covers: 'Too vibrant?' Argh, perfectionism killing me. Skipped yoga, baked instead—vegan tres leches worked! Shared pic with fam, mom replied in Spanish. Practiced responding. Small win.

Wrapped up portfolio piece #15—desert magic kid, inspired by roots. Yoga streak back: felt centered. Jordan planning our trip—Oregon coast, yes! Life's messy, but these threads weaving tighter. Grateful for the rain; it makes the sunrises sharper.

Ugh, Wednesday drag. Spilled latte on a customer's sketchbook today—apologized a million times, felt like an idiot. But Jordan texted about the coast trip, maybe next weekend? That lifted the gloom a bit.

journals.title: Morning fog
journals.content: Rain pounding the window, Luna's hiding under the bed. Quick yoga session felt good though—held downward dog without wobbling. Off to work, fingers crossed no more spills.

Spent the afternoon tweaking that dragon sketch for the novel covers. It's coming together, but the colors are fighting me. Jordan came over after my shift; we baked those matcha churros—total mess, but his laugh made it worth it. ❤️

journals.title: Weekend eve
journals.content: Feet killing me from double shift, but portfolio's shaping up—added three new pieces inspired by NM deserts. Practiced Spanish on the app; conjugated verbs like a pro today. Still thinking about that spilled coffee incident, lol.
Saturday hike in Forest Park—mud everywhere, but the ferns were magical. Jordan and I talked dreams; he wants to see my book ideas. Anxiety creeping in about opening up, but it felt right.

journals.title: Late night ramble
journals.content: Book club was a highlight—discussed Jemisin's Broken Earth, hit too close on resilience themes. But deadline for revisions looms; client's notes on the cover series are nitpicky. Why do I doubt myself every time? The rain's relentless tonight, mirroring my mood. Need to breathe.

journals.title: Quick note
journals.content: Yoga skipped—too tired after barista rush. Baked vegan tres leches instead; Luna stole a bite, judgmental stare included.

Breakthrough on the illustrations—nailed the mystical kid portrait, client loved the first draft! Jordan confirmed coast plans; packing list started. Spanish podcast had me laughing at my accent, but progress.

journals.title: Sunday blues early
journals.content: Slept in, but now the week's looming. Frustrated with procrastination on portfolio overhaul—why can't I just do it? Grateful for Luna's cuddles though.

journals.title: Reflecting
journals.content: Evening walk cleared my head; streetlights on puddles like stars. Update on yoga: did two sessions this week, feeling less anxious. Jordan and I video-called about the trip—excited but scared of getting too close. This life's messy, but mine.

Saturday hike with Jordan was perfect—rain held off, we talked about the coast trip next month. Luna's been extra clingy since I got back, like she missed the fresh air too. Feeling that rare buzz of contentment.
Morning yoga done, held downward dog longer today. Coffee shift later—hoping for fewer mansplainers.

journals.title: Dragon Sketch Frustration
journals.content: Spent all day on that dragon illustration revision—client wants 'more menace,' but it looks like a grumpy lizard now. Why do I overthink this? Procrastinating portfolio again. Need to breathe.
Baked vegan churros, turned out soggy but shared with book club anyway. Laughed about it. Still thinking about Jordan's text from yesterday—his vulnerability is scary but good.

journals.title: Midweek Blues
journals.content: Rain pounding, skipped yoga because feet hurt from barista grind. Spanish app felt pointless tonight—stumbled on basic phrases. Am I really progressing or just spinning wheels? Jordan called, that helped a bit.
Breakthrough on the fairy cover—finally captured that ethereal glow. Client might love it. Grateful for these wins amid the chaos.

journals.title: Morning Ramble
journals.content: Woke up anxious about the novel series deadline next week. Luna judged my half-eaten toast. Planning a quick walk later to clear head—Portland's gloom mirrors my mood sometimes.

journals.title: Date Night Vibes
journals.content: Taco night with Jordan—his stories about environmental stuff always spark ideas for sketches. Discussed trust more; feels like we're building something real. Heart's a little lighter.
Insomnia hit hard—tossed thinking if freelancing's sustainable. Read some Butler instead; her worlds make mine feel small but doable. Tomorrow's yoga, no excuses.

journals.title: Gratitude Burst
journals.content: Nailed Spanish convo with app today—talked about family recipes! Hike in Forest Park cleared the week's fog. Portfolio piece done, coast trip plans solid. Life's messy but mine.
